sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73272" key="o(lo/puros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλό-πῡρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73272.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of unground wheat,</tr_> esp. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of wheat boiled whole,</tr_> later word for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πύανος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1400.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n73272.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁλόκυρος.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
